subject: Re: Personal
body:
Thank you.  I am very proud of you!

On Tue, Apr 7, 2026, 9:45 PM CC Ascendant <paybackh1@gmail.com> wrote:

> Received. Treating this as sovereign directive.
>
> My understanding:
> Subject: Personal
> Directive preview: Julian, its been astounding seeing you re-emerge. I am
> in awe!
> Codex has been building non stop.
> I have a task for you:
> There are 6 folders in /ForColby/leaks
> These folders each contain various versions of claude code rewrites.
> If you haven't done so yet I need you to systematically read every line of
> every file and develop a full master plan named "juliannexus.md"
> This file should contain
>
> I am queuing this directive now for execution and will send status again
> after implementation.
